TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Nchekwa Windows na-egosi ịdọ aka ná ntị ma ọ bụrụ na ijighị akaụntụ Microsoft wee bata. Ịkwụsị na-ezochi ọkwa a na-emegharị ugboro ugboro.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Na-akọwa oge oge mgbe Windows agaghị amalitegharị PC gị ozugbo ka ọ rụchaa wụnye mmelite.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Na-edekọ ọrụ gị n'ofe ngwaọrụ mgbe ịbanye na akaụntụ Microsoft ma nwee ike mekọrịta ya na igwe ojii. Ịkwụsị na-edobe mmemme na mpaghara.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Na-achịkwa ka njikwa Akaụntụ onye ọrụ si akpa àgwà mgbe ngwa na-arịọ oke ùgwù. Ihe ndabara na-akpali maka nkwenye, Akwụsịla mkpali UAC. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Na-agbakwụnye iwu firewall iji gbochie ngwa Adobe ịnweta ịntanetị. Nke a na-emetụta nkwado ikike, mmekọrịta igwe ojii, yana atụmatụ ígwé ojii okike. Nke a bụ mgbanwe dị oke egwu nke nwere ike isi ike ma ọ bụ agaghị ekwe omume ịtụgharị.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Na-emepụta ụzọ mkpirisi desktọpụ nke na-amaliteghachi PC ozugbo n'ime menu nhọrọ mmalite dị elu (Windows Recovery Environment).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Windows na-ekenye NJ mgbasa ozi pụrụ iche na akaụntụ gị nke ngwa nwere ike iji gosi mgbasa ozi ezubere iche. Ịgbanyụọ na-akwụsị nsochi a.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Ịkwanye mmanya aha mpio na-ebelata windo ndị ọzọ mepere emepe. Gbanyụọ ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọta ihe a na-akpalite site na mberede n'oge eji eme ihe.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Na-edobe ụdị agba ndabara nke ngwa na-eji mgbe ha na-asọpụrụ ntọala sistemụ: Ọchịchịrị ma ọ bụ Ìhè.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Na-enye Windows ohere icheta ma gbanwee gaa na asụsụ ntinye dị iche ma ọ bụ okirikiri nhọrọ ukwuu nke mpio ngwa.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Windows nwere ike ịwụnye ngwa echere na nzuzo n'azụ na-ajụghị gị. Ịgbanyụọ na-akwụsị omume a. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: SmartScreen na-enyocha faịlụ na ngwa ebudatara megide nchekwa data aha igwe wee dọọ gị aka na ntị tupu ị na-eme ihe ndị a na-amaghị ama. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Na-achịkwa ma Windows na-emepe ngwa ngwa ma ọ bụ malite ngwa mgbe ịtinye USB mbanye ma ọ bụ mgbasa ozi mbughari ọzọ.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Mgbe Windows kwụsịrị (ihuenyo na-acha anụnụ anụnụ), ọ nwere ike ịmalitegharị na-akpaghị aka. Ịkwụsị na-dobe njehie ahụ na ihuenyo ka ị nwee ike ịgụ koodu nkwụsị.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Na-achịkwa ma ekwenyere ngwa ka ọ na-emelite ma na-emelite n'azụ mgbe anaghị elekwasị anya. Ị gbanyụọ na-echekwa CPU na ebe nchekwa. Nke a bụ mgbanwe dị oke egwu nke nwere ike isi ike ma ọ bụ agaghị ekwe omume ịtụgharị.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Igbe nchọta mmalite menu nwere ike igosi nsonaazụ webụ Bing n'akụkụ rịzọlt mpaghara. Ịgbanyụọ na-edobe ịchọ NchNhr mmalite naanị mpaghara.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Na-achịkwa ma Windows na-abanye na ọnọdụ mgbake na-akpaghị aka ka mbọ buut dara ada sochirinụ. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Gbanyụọ mgbakwunye nhọrọ ihe nchọgharị Brave: ụgwọ ọrụ, obere akpa crypto, VPN na nkata AI. Ọ na-emetụta naanị atụmatụ Brave ndị a, ọ bụghị nchọgharị gị. Nke a bụ mgbanwe dị oke egwu nke nwere ike isi ike ma ọ bụ agaghị ekwe omume ịtụgharị.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Na-egosi koodu mperi akọwapụtara na ihuenyo na-acha anụnụ anụnụ nke ọnwụ kama ịbụ naanị ihu mwute ihu emoji.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Na-egosiputa nọmba nrụpụta Windows na mbipụta dị ka akara mmiri na akuku aka nri ala nke desktọpụ gị.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Na-agbakwụnye nhọrọ Wụnye na nri-pịa ọnọdụ ọnọdụ maka faịlụ ebe nchekwa .cab.
TweakWhy_Camera: Nna-ukwu na-atụgharị na-achịkwa ma ngwa nwere ike ịrịọ ohere na igwefoto gị. Ị gbanyụọ na-egbochi ngwa niile iji igwefoto. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Na-achịkwa ma agbanyere igodo mkpọchi Caps. Ịgbanyụọ igodo Caps Lock wee pịa ya anaghị eme ihe ọ bụla.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Na-achịkwa ma ndị ọrụ nwere ike ịgbanwe atụmatụ ụda Windows. Ịkwụsị nke a na-akpọchi atụmatụ dị ugbu a ma gbochie mgbanwe.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Na-egosi obere igbe nrịbama n'akụkụ faịlụ na nchekwa dị na Explorer iji mee ka ọ dị mfe ịhọrọ ọtụtụ ihe na-ejideghị Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: WinGet bụ njikwa ngwungwu arụnyere n'ime Windows eji wụnye na melite ngwa site na ahịrị iwu. Nke a na-eme ka a hụ na etinyere ya na nke ọhụrụ.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Koodu iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe echekwabara Hypervisor na-eme koodu kernel Windows n'ime ebe a na-eme nke ọma iji gbochie malware na rootkits ọkwa kernel. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Na-ekpochapụ ndepụta faịlụ ọhụrụ na-akpaghị aka oge ọ bụla ị pụta. Na-eme ka nzuzo dị na igwe nkekọrịta ma ọ bụ ọtụtụ ndị ọrụ.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Na-echekwa akụkọ ihe mere eme nke ihe e depụtaghachiri ka ị nwee ike mado na obere vidiyo ndị gara aga site na iji Win+V. Kwado ịgbanwuo njirimara a.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Na-egosi ma ọ bụ zoo nhọrọ nchekwa agbakwunyere (zipped) na pịa nri ọhụrụ n'ime Njikwa Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Na-enye PC a ohere ịkekọrịta njikọ ịntanetị ya na ngwaọrụ ndị ọzọ, na-eme dị ka ebe nchekwa ngwanrọ. Ịkwanye na-egosi nhọrọ a na ntọala netwọk. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Na-edobe ụdị ngosipụta nke ndabara maka Ogwe njikwa ka ọ bụrụ akara ngosi buru ibu, obere akara ngosi, ma ọ bụ mkpokọta ụdị ndabara.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Na-ewepụ Copilot, Ncheta, yana ihe niile metụtara Windows AI. Nwụnye ọzọ chọrọ ịnweta winget ma ọ bụ Ụlọ Ahịa Microsoft.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Na-egbochi Cortana ịmalite na-akpaghị aka na mmalite. Enwere ike imepe Cortana na aka ma ọ dị mkpa.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Na-emepụta ebe mweghachi sistemu Windows ka ị nwee ike tụgharịa mgbanwe sistemụ ma ọ bụrụ na ihe adịghị mma. Akwadoro tupu ịme tweaks ọ bụla.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Na-ahapụ gị ịmaliteghachi ọrụ site na ngwaọrụ Windows ndị ọzọ na PC a site na mmapụta ngosi. Gbanyụọ ma ọ bụrụ na ijighị njirimara ngwaọrụ a.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Hazie profaịlụ netwọkụ maka njikọ gị na-arụ ọrụ ugbu a. Nkeonwe na-enyere aka ịchọpụta na ikesa netwọkụ, Ọha na-amachibido ya. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Hazie ngwa ọnụ na-emepe mgbe ịmalitere Command Prompt ma ọ bụ PowerShell n'ime Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Mepee taabụ nchọgharị Edge na igwe mebere dịpụrụ adịpụ iji gbochie webụsaịtị ọjọọ ịnweta sistemụ nnabata ma ọ bụ faịlụ ya. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Na-enyere nchedo dabere igwe ojii nke Microsoft Defender maka nleba anya ihe iyi egwu n'ezie site na iji nchekwa data ọgụgụ isi iyi egwu zuru ụwa ọnụ nke Microsoft. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Na-arụ ọrụ antivirus Microsoft Defender n'ime usoro igbe igbe dịpụrụ adịpụ maka nchebe ọzọ. Na-agbakwunye obere arụmọrụ n'elu. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Na-egosi ma ọ bụ zoo akara ngosi Windows Security (Defender) na tray sistemụ. Izobe ya anaghị agbanyụọ nchekwa nchekwa.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Windows nwere ike iji PC gị kesaa data nbudata Windows na PC ndị ọzọ na netwọkụ gị ma ọ bụ ịntanetị. Ịkwụsị na-edobe nbudata gị na nzuzo. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Tọọ Mgbochi Mgbochi data ka ọ bụrụ ọnọdụ ịpụ apụ, na-enye nchebe DEP maka usoro niile ma ewezuga ndị ị wepụrụ n'ụzọ doro anya. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Na-achịkwa ole data nyocha nke Windows na-ezigara Microsoft. Opekempe na-eziga naanị ozi ngwaọrụ yana data ntụkwasị obi.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Ọrụ DiagTrack na-anakọta ma bulite ojiji Windows yana data nyocha na sava Microsoft. Ịkwụsị ya na-akwụsị ibulite telemetry ndabere. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Na-ewepụ ndenye cipher AES nke na-adịghị ike na oyi akwa nchekwa Windows SCHANNEL. Na-amanye ngwa iji kparịta nhazi nhazi cipher siri ike karị. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Na-egbochi Windows ịme mmemme na-akpaghị aka na draịva USB na mgbasa ozi mbughari ndị ọzọ. Na-akwụsị vector na-agbasa malware.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Na-ahazi ntọala algọridim SCHANNEL hash. Gbanyụọ MD5 ma mee ka algọridim ezinụlọ SHA nwee nkwenye siri ike siri ike. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Gbanyụọ usoro nchịkọta protocol IPv6 n'obosara. Akwadoro ma ọ bụrụ na netwọk gị anaghị eji IPv6 belata elu ọgụ na-enweghị isi. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Gbanyụọ ciphers RC2 na RC4 na SCHANNEL. Algọridim ndị a gbajiri n'ụzọ cryptography na ekwesighi iji ya na njikọ TLS ọ bụla. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: DCOM bụ usoro mmalite mmalite nke ngwa ọrụ njikwa ụlọ ọrụ chọrọ (SCCM, WMI). Ịkwụsị ya na-ebelata elu ọgụ mana ọ nwere ike imebi usoro njikwa ọrụ dịpụrụ adịpụ.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Gbanyụọ mkpakọ SMB iji chebe megide CVE-2020-0796. Naanị na-emetụta mkpakọ okporo ụzọ SMB, ọ bụghị ọsọ ịnweta faịlụ. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Na-ewepu ozi timestamp TCP na ngwugwu netwọkụ. Na-egbochi sistemu dịpụrụ adịpụ ibipụta mkpịsị aka OS gị dabere n'oge ọrụ. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Gbanyụọ DES Triple (3DES) na SCHANNEL. 3DES adịghị mfe na mwakpo ụbọchị ọmụmụ SWEET32 ma anaghịkwa ewere ya dị ka nchekwa. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Na-arụ ọrụ nhicha Windows Disk arụnyere n'ime ya iji wepu faịlụ nwa oge, cache sistemu na data ndị ọzọ na-adịghị mkpa iji wepụta ohere diski. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Na-ewepụ ngwa ngwa ugboro ugboro na Nchekwa Windows na-arịọ gị ka ị jiri akaụntụ Microsoft wee banye maka nchebe ọzọ.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Na-ewepụ ngwa ngwa ugboro ugboro na Nchekwa Windows na-arịọ gị ka ị mee ka nzacha aha SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Na-ezochi nyocha DNS site na izipu ha na HTTPS kama UDP doro anya. Na-egbochi ISP ma ọ bụ netwọk gị nlekota ma ọ bụ mebie okporo ụzọ DNS. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Na-ejikwa ma Nchekwa Windows akara faịlụ ebudatara dị ka enweghị nchekwa site na iji iyi data ọzọ Zone.Identifier.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Na-etinye ntọala amụma otu iji gbanyụọ telemetry, onye inyeaka ịzụ ahịa, mkpokọta, akụkụ akụkụ Copilot na mgbakwunye Edge ndị ọzọ nhọrọ. Nke a bụ mgbanwe dị oke egwu nke nwere ike isi ike ma ọ bụ agaghị ekwe omume ịtụgharị.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Na-egosi ma ọ bụ na-ezochi nhọrọ nchịkọta vidiyo Clipchamp dezie n'ime menu ọnọdụ nri-pịa maka faịlụ vidiyo.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Na-egosi ma ọ bụ zoo nhọrọ dezie na nhọrọ dị n'akụkụ nri pịa nri maka faịlụ onyonyo.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Na-egosi ma ọ bụ zoo dezie ya na nhọrọ foto na mpio ihe onyonyo a pịa aka nri maka faịlụ onyonyo.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Na-akwado mgbochi mkpachapụ anya maka njirimara ihu Windows Hello. Naanị emetụta ma ọ bụrụ na ị nwere ngwaike biometric dakọtara.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Na-enye ohere njikọ SMB na oke netwọk na-achọghị nyocha. Achọrọ maka ịnweta ngwaọrụ NAS ochie, ndị nbipute, ma ọ bụ ndị na-anya ụgbọ elu. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Na-egosi faịlụ ezoro ezo na akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ na faịlụ abịakọrọ na-acha anụnụ anụnụ na Njikwa Explorer. Na-eme ka ụdị faịlụ ndị a nwee ike ịmata ozugbo.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Osooso òké nke na-edozi ọsọ cursor dabere n'otu ọsọ ị na-ebugharị òké ahụ. Gbanyụọ maka ntinye raw òké na-agbanwe agbanwe, akwadoro maka egwuregwu.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Mgbe ngwa dara, mkpesa Error Windows nwere ike izipu akụkọ na Microsoft. Ịgbanyụọ na-akwụsị data a ịhapụ igwe gị.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Na-emepụta nleba anya n'ụdị ihe omume nzacha iji gosi mmemme okike usoro, na-eme ka ọ dịrị mfe inyocha mmemme ewepụtara.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: Njikwa Explorer na-achọpụta ụdị ọdịnaya nke folda ọ bụla wee tinye ndebiri nlele dabara adaba. Ịkwụsị na-akpọchi folda niile na nlele ọnyà na-agbanwe agbanwe.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Na-egosi ụzọ nchekwa zuru oke na ogwe aha File Explorer kama naanị aha nchekwa. Ọ bara uru mgbe ị na-arụ ọrụ na ọtụtụ nchekwa nke otu aha.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Ịpị F1 na File Explorer ma ọ bụ na desktọpụ ga-emepe webụsaịtị enyemaka Windows na ihe nchọgharị gị. Ịkwụsị na-egbochi mmalite ihe nchọgharị a.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Na-enyere menu igodo F8 aka nketa ga-enye gị ohere ịhọrọ ọnọdụ nchekwa yana nhọrọ mmalite ndị ọzọ n'oge usoro buut Windows.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Ụdị nkwụsị ngwakọ nke na-echekwa steeti kernel na diski ka Windows na-agba ọsọ ọsọ. Nwere ike ịkpata nsogbu na ntọala abụọ-boot ma ọ bụ nkwụsị zuru ezu.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Na-achịkwa ugboro ole Windows na-arịọ gị ka ị tụọ ahụmịhe gị ma ọ bụ nyefee nzaghachi. Ịtọlite ​​​​ka Ọ dịghị mgbe ọ ga-akwụsị nzaghachi nzaghachi niile.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Na-egosi mkparịta ụka nkwenye tupu ihichapụ faịlụ kpamkpam. Kwado ịnweta ngwa ngwa tupu ezipụ faịlụ na recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Na-ebelata ohere dị n'etiti ihe dị na File Explorer maka nlegharị anya ndepụta nwere nnukwu ozi.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Na-egosi ndọtị faịlụ (dịka .txt, .exe) mgbe aha faịlụ ọ bụla dị na Explorer. Na-enyere aka ịmata ụdị faịlụ dị na nlele.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Na-egosi mkparịta ụka ọganihu zuru ezu maka arụmọrụ faịlụ (mbipụta, bugharịa, hichapụ) na ndabara kama ogwe ọganihu dị ntakịrị.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Na-ejikwa ma idetu faịlụ na mkparịta ụka kwagharịa na-egosi nkọwa zuru oke dịka ọsọ na oge fọdụrụ na ndabara.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Na-enyere ma ọ bụ gbanyụọ Windows Defender Firewall n'ofe profaịlụ netwọkụ niile. Ịkwụsị na-ahapụ ọdụ ụgbọ mmiri niile na-abanye n'enweghị nzacha. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Na-egosi mmemme nnabata dị nkenke yana ihuenyo Hi oge mbụ ị banyere ka emelitere nnukwu Windows.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Mepee windo nchekwa Explorer ọ bụla na usoro nke ya. Ọ bụrụ na otu daa, ndị ọzọ na-emeghe. Na-eji ntakịrị ebe nchekwa.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Na-achịkwa ma a na-achịkọta faịlụ ndị dị na folda nbudata site na ụbọchị gbanwetụrụ. Ịtọlite ​​na Ọ dịghị nke na-egosi faịlụ niile dị na listi dị larịị.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: Njirimara Windows na-ebuli egwuregwu na ngwa na-agba ọsọ na ọnọdụ ihuenyo zuru oke maka ịrụ ọrụ ka mma. Ịkwụsị nwere ike idozi nsogbu ndakọrịta na ụfọdụ egwuregwu ochie.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Ndekọ ndabere na-aga n'ihu na-ejide egwuregwu egwuregwu ka ị nwee ike chekwaa nkeji ole na ole ikpeazụ ka ihe mere. Ịkwụsị na-ahapụ GPU na akụrụngwa diski maka nkwụsi ike FPS ka mma.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Ịhazi oge GPU na ngwa ngwa ngwaike na-ahapụ GPU jikwaa ebe nchekwa vidiyo nke ya ozugbo, nwere ike ibelata ntinye ntinye na egwuregwu.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Na-echekwa ọdịnaya RAM niile na diski wee gbanyụọ PC kpamkpam. Faịlụ hibernation nwere ike iji ọtụtụ gigabytes nke ohere diski.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Na-egosi faịlụ na nchekwa ndị akara ka ezoro ezo na Njikwa Explorer. Ihe ezoro ezo na-apụta ìhè ntakịrị mgbe a na-ahụ ya.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Otu ụlọ bụ njirimara Windows maka ịkekọrịta faịlụ n'etiti PC ụlọ. Ewepụrụ ya na Windows 10 1803 mana ọrụ ndị fọdụrụ ka nwere ike ịdị.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Nbudata ma bubata faịlụ mbelata irigbu arụrụ arụ arụgoro na Windows Defender Exploit Guard, na-etinye mbelata usoro omenala. Nke a bụ mgbanwe dị oke egwu nke nwere ike isi ike ma ọ bụ agaghị ekwe omume ịtụgharị.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Na-ahazi usoro ntinye ahụigodo ndabara nke Windows na-eji. Bekee na-amanye okirikiri nhọrọ ukwuu Bekee n'agbanyeghị asụsụ ndị ọzọ arụnyere.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Windows na-akpakọ akwụkwọ ahụaja JPEG mgbe ị na-edobe ha ka ndabere desktọpụ. Ịtọlite ​​na Max na-echekwa ogo onyonyo zuru oke.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Na-enye ohere webụsaịtị ịgụ ndepụta mmasị asụsụ Windows gị ka ọ hazie ọdịnaya. Gbanyụọ ka igbochi weebụsaịtị ịchọpụta ntọala asụsụ gị.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Nyochaa ndị ọbịa maka SMB bụ vector mpụta-mpụta a ma ama nke nwere nkwarụ site na ndabara kemgbe Windows 10 1709. Inye ya na-ekpughe sistemụ ahụ na ohere SMB na-akwadoghị. Mee naanị maka ndakọrịta ngwaọrụ nke ketara.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Na-amanye ngwa 32-bit na 64-bit ka ọ jiri ụdị oge .NET arụnyere kachasị ọhụrụ kama ụdị nke e wuru na mbụ megide ya.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Njikọ-Mkpebi Aha Multicast Mpaghara na-edozi aha nnabata na netwọkụ mpaghara. Enwere ike iji ya mee ihe na mwakpo njide nzere ma bụrụ nke kachasị nwee nkwarụ. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Na-agba usoro Windows LSA na ọnọdụ echedoro iji gbochie izu ohi nzere site na ngwaọrụ dị ka Mimikatz. Akwadoro maka sistemụ niile. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Na-achịkwa ma ngwa nwere ike ịnweta ọnọdụ mpaghara ngwaọrụ gị. Ịkwụsị na-egbochi nsochi ọnọdụ site na ngwa niile. Mgbanwe a na-ebu ihe egwu na-agafeghị oke ma nwee ike imetụta ụfọdụ usoro ọrụ.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Na-achịkwa ma egosipụtara ihuenyo mkpọchi Windows tupu ihuenyo nbanye na Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Na-etinye mmetụta blur acrylic na ndabere ihuenyo nbanye. Ị gbanyụọ na-egosi ndabere na-enweghị inyoghi inyoghi.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Na-achịkwa ma egosipụtara ihuenyo mkpọchi Windows tupu ihuenyo nbanye Windows 10 (ụzọ amụma oge RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Ngwungwu Ahụmịhe Weebụ Windows na-agbakwunye wijetị na ọdịnaya dị ike na ihuenyo mkpọchi yana ogwe ọrụ. Ịgbanyụọ na-ewepụ ihe ndị a.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Windows nwere ike ịkpọte PC gị n'ụra otu abalị ka ọ rụọ ọrụ mmezi akpaka. Ịgbanyụọ na-egbochi mkpali abalị na-achọghị.
